reviews.review_description: It is mind boggling how utter incompetence is so openly showcased with this app. By adding an irremovable glaring blue symbol (a useless invite button) this app is rendered unusable. After countless querys of users to remove this button, absolutely nothing has happened and most likely, nothing ever will.
Awesome
Support youtube

I have oculus go.
This app is very well done. Setting is perfect. Scenery is awesome. And size and distance of screen is just right.
All apps work well except newsy- it did not load for some reason.
I can't wait for next generation of oculus go or something similar with better resolution. 
Current resolution is good enough for short time but we are spoiled by high resolution of all other screens.
I highly recommend this app.
One minor issue- click on Netflix and it takes us out and to Netflix room. It kind of breaks the spell.
Also please support YouTube.
Thanks
Not at all worth the free download.

Screen is way too small. Give use environments to sit in to watch tv apps and local videos, and give us screen size options. I don’t watch videos on my Quest 2 to have a screen smaller than my own TV at home. Give us theater environments with HUGE screens. You had a better app in Oculus Gallery or the TV app on the Oculus Go.

How hard is it to add this to the quest, my friends have Oculus Go’s and I want to watch movies with them and play games in oculus rooms as well idk why that’s not cross platform either... bad decision making

reviews.review_title: Annoying invite friends icon ALWAYS  on!
reviews.review_description: Last update on June 3 2019 introduced a new feture: the possibility to invite friends in oculus tv. But the blue invite friends icon is ALWAYS on , right next to the oculus tv screen! There is no option to disable, hide (or move away) that blue icon! This is terrible annoying when watching movies!!  Please fix this issue, add option to hide, disable or move the blue invite friends icon AWAY from the screen. Also, a screen resize option would be more than needed! Hope the developers will fix these issues in an update.

So I like oculus tv it hulu and Netflix but a new app we are all missing out on here when we wana use it is the new Disney Plus, I mean there is disney vr but really is isn't worth using in my opinion so if you could maybe add disney plus to this it would be great other than that minor thing it's good.
I downloaded this, but had nothing to watch, there's nothing to see except the back drop and I can't even change that. Dev team can this be looked in to please, even Demo movies would be something.
App keeps crashing if you click on a video to open it with Oculus TV, it only works if you click onto videos in-app.

reviews.review_title: I believe that I need this browser in or
reviews.review_description: To watch movies.

The most recent update added a new blue button, at the bottom left-hand corner of the screen, that can not be removed or hidden. I even went so far as resetting the Oculus Go to factory settings. After the update, the hideous bright blue button was back.

If you want us to use this app, then please let us have a beautiful place to watch the videos. The bright blue button takes away from any viewing experience.

reviews.review_title: It won't let me open it
reviews.review_description: Can you help me pls

What a brilliant idea somebody putting a nice bright button next to a screen in full view and sticking out like a sore thumb as there is no option to hide it, taking into consideration there is already one in the menu next to our avatar which we can hide. It's no different than some bright spark using a torch next to their TV while they are sat watching it. Also there is no control on the Oculus Go with the remote even after an update. You simply cannot watch the videos because you can't get to them. Uninstalled as the app is totally useless in it's present form

reviews.review_title: Screen blockage in drive in theater
reviews.review_description: I downloaded Oculus TV so that I could invite friends to watch a movie through plex which can only be done in the drive in theater. It's really cool in there but the rim of the front window to the car cuts through screen. Sure, you can move the screen upward but then you're lifting your head the whole time. I hope you can fix this. Thank you!
Best app

Why can't we watch Netflix and others with friends in a social setting?  If not here, then in oculus rooms?  This is the main reason I got this device. Would be no different than having your friends to your house to watch a movie... Except they might be in a different state or country.  Isn't that the point of all this?
You can't bring friends in the room,  WHY?

reviews.review_title: Why not just build onto Oculus Video?
reviews.review_description: I don't see the point. Inferior to existing Oculus Video app.
